meaning: n.举,提高,高岗,高地,浮雕装饰
examples: The old man moved away, raising his hand in salutation.
Raising animals was only secondary to other forms of farming.
He set about raising an army.
Raising taxes is about killing jobs and hurting small businesses and making things worse.
It met its target of raising 100 million euros, but has not issued another sukuk since.
